architectural_notes: Q-007 fix (Option A): LatentStackConfig.volatility_signal_dim=1 injects E3._running_variance as scalar into beta_encoder at each encode() call. Biological analog: LC-NE unexpected uncertainty signal (Yu & Dayan 2005). Volatile envs reset hazard positions each episode -> E3 running_variance stays elevated -> z_beta arousal elevated. Stable envs -> E3 learns positions → running_variance decays -> z_beta arousal lower. Option C (harm-stream arousal) is the long-term target post SD-010.
